root.rep_text: รายงาน - งบทดลอง(A3)
root.sql: select sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id, (select account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where account_id = sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id) as account_name, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount from sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep order by sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id
